---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, language feature, or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Quilt currently makes hard or impossible?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. For language/syntax ideas, a sketch of what the
`.quilt` source and its expansion would look like helps a lot.

## Alternatives

Other approaches you've considered or workarounds you're using today.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, prior art in other metaprogramming systems, etc.
